extension.summary: [COLOR red]Installs binaries for The Red Wizard Full, Family, Xbox, Redflix Plus, Ultra-Lite, Ultra-Lite Gratis and Touch! Kodi 21 Omega builds[/COLOR]
extension.description: [COLOR red]Installs binary addons on install and update: "inputstream.adaptive" and "inputstream.ffmpegdirect"[/COLOR]
extension.news: [COLOR red]2026-02-25 - Now a standalone plug-in (not a dependency)[/COLOR]
